states.name: Shen Long
states.title: Divine Dragon Lord
states.description: Legends say there are six Dragon Lords, one per every element of Erden: Fire, Storm, Water, Earth, Light and Shadow. They all share the goal of defeating the Eternal, but the Dragon Lords of Light and Shadow are also destined to eternally clash with each other.

states.name: Shen Long
states.title: Divine Dragon Lord
states.description: Weary and covered in scars left by battles with her archenemy and countless adversities, the Dragon Lord of Light looked for a place to make her final lair. At last, she reached the mountains, and lived there in peace and solitude for years—until the day the silence of her home was broken by the sound of footsteps.

states.name: Shen Long
states.title: Divine Dragon Lord
states.description:
The intruder introduced herself as Rias. She was a fearless and irreverent girl, and she loved her village more than anything. A certain young man she promised to spend her life with lived there too.
The moment she asked to become the Dragon Lord's next vessel, the young man's face flashed across her mind.
"You've always been popular with the girls," she thought to herself, "I'm sure you'll be fine without me."
Still, a faint memory of him and a hint of longing remained in the depths of the Dragon Lord's soul for years.
